records.m_Talk_ENG: Great work, Miss Swan. We are almost done with the shoot.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Great work, Miss Swan. We are almost done with the shoot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The script was really thrilling until the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The script was really thrilling until the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The script was really thrilling until the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even the viewers' reaction is great. The director and sponsor are already talking about making another season, did you know?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Even the viewers' reaction is great. The director and sponsor are already talking about making another season, did you know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Next season?

records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Next season?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I don't know anything about that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I don't know anything about that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I don't know anything about that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no next season. The ending of the script has been decided a long time ago.

records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no next season. The ending of the script has been decided a long time ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It ends with the main character, the detective, dying with his nemesis.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It ends with the main character, the detective, dying with his nemesis.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It ends with the main character, the detective, dying with his nemesis.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're going to kill off the main character? Our viewers won't like that...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're going to kill off the main character? Our viewers won't like that...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're going to kill off the main character? Our viewers won't like that...

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, besides that! Then, what about the contract with the sponsor?
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, besides that! Then, what about the contract with the sponsor?
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, besides that! Then, what about the contract with the sponsor?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you end it like that, they're going to ask for a huge settlement.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you end it like that, they're going to ask for a huge settlement.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you end it like that, they're going to ask for a huge settlement.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So the director decided all this behind my back, I see.

records.m_Talk_FRA: So the director decided all this behind my back, I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter. I'm not interested in a contract that happened when I wasn't present.

records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter. I'm not interested in a contract that happened when I wasn't present.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go tell this to the director.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Go tell this to the director.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The script for next week's filming will be the last episode of the series.

records.m_Talk_FRA: The script for next week's filming will be the last episode of the series.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Nice job, blonde hair! We got the sniper!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grrrrr. KRRRRR!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The role I gave you is a hermit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you going off script...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you going off script...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to hear an answer from you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to hear an answer from you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to hear an answer from you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Humans. Do not act without something in return.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Humans. Act on profit.

8v

8v

records.m_Talk_FRA: When the world changed and Sephira descended to earth, you were also there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whether that was <color=#ffd34c>your</color> will or <color=#ffd34c>your kind's</color> will, targeting that child can't be a coincidence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Much like black and white, light and shadow, or even the two side of one coin.

records.m_Talk_FRA: You two are the complete opposite, and yet drawn to each other.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That means that you are also beings created by <color=#ffd34c>the law of creating a world</color>.

8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle Wright.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle Wright.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You seemed to have learned how to devote yourself to cherishing your relationship.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Even without my help, I'm sure you can make that wish come true.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Humans. Do not act without something in return.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Humans. Act on profit.
